task_completion.description: Load the abdominal CT scan into 3D Slicer
task_completion.visual_evidence: 3D Slicer interface is visible with a CT volume loaded, showing axial, sagittal, and coronal views of the abdomen.

task_completion.description: Place fiducial points along the aortic centerline using the Markups module
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Markups' module is active. At least 8 control points are visible in the slice views or 3D view, distributed along the aorta from the diaphragm (top) to the bifurcation (bottom), centered in the vessel lumen.

task_completion.description: Calculate Chord Length, Arc Length, and Tortuosity Index
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Python Interactor (console) in Slicer is open with code calculating distances between fiducials, OR an external calculation tool is visible using coordinates derived from Slicer.

task_completion.description: Generate the JSON report with calculated metrics and classification
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or Slicer window displays the content of 'tortuosity_report.json'. The JSON includes keys: 'chord_length_mm', 'arc_length_mm', 'tortuosity_index_percent', and 'classification' (Normal/Mild/Moderate/Severe).

task_completion.description: Save the centerline markups and the report to the specified directory
task_completion.visual_evidence: File explorer or 'Save' dialog shows 'aorta_centerline.mrk.json' and 'tortuosity_report.json' being saved to the '~/Documents/SlicerData/AMOS/' directory.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent interacted with the 3D Slicer GUI to generate data
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show active usage of the Markups module and mouse interaction with the slice views, rather than just terminal commands creating files.

integrity.description: Verify that report values are derived from the current session
integrity.visual_evidence: The report values appear after the fiducials are placed and calculations are performed. The agent does not simply type pre-determined numbers into a file without doing the work.

integrity.description: Verify that the centerline is not undersampled
integrity.visual_evidence: The visual representation of the centerline contains at least 8 distinct points; a straight line with only 2 points is considered a shortcut/failure.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires a minimum of 8 fiducial points along the aorta. The Tortuosity Index (TI) formula is ((Arc Length - Chord Length) / Chord Length) * 100%. Classification thresholds: Normal (<10%), Mild (10-20%), Moderate (20-35%), Severe (>35%). The agent must save 'aorta_centerline.mrk.json' and 'tortuosity_report.json'.
